title: Iran war’s fuel crisis spurs panic, violence in nations facing shortages
summary_full: Gasoline is being stolen and gas station workers in Bangladesh, Pakistan and India have been killed over fuel shortages and soaring prices caused by the war against Iran.
summary_public: Gasoline is being stolen and gas station workers in Bangladesh, Pakistan and India have been killed over fuel shortages and soaring prices caused by the war against Iran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war’s fuel crisis spurs panic, violence in nations facing shortages
